name: Boxer
title: Boxer - Software Landing Page
description: Software/SaaS landing page template with clean sections and blue accent color. White fixed navbar with Boxer brand and 5 text-uppercase links. Hero section with background image, dark overlay, centered large heading, italic description paragraph, and software mockup image. Divider section with 3-column icon features (laptop, twitter, font) with blue icons (60px) and uppercase headings. Feature section on light gray (#f8f8f8) with 2-column layout: left has heading, description, and feature items with blue circular icons; right has software mockup image. Second feature section reverses the layout. Pricing section on light gray with 3 pricing cards (Basic $11, Business $22, Pro $33) each with colored title bar (#28a7e9), price, feature list, and Sign Up button; middle card is elevated (active). Download section with 2-column layout: heading, description, download button with icon, and software image. Contact section with background image, dark overlay, 2-column layout: left has heading, description, and address block; right has contact form. Simple footer with copyright. Preloader with rotating plane animation.

typography.style: Bold uppercase headings with light body weight

layoutDetails: Bootstrap 3 grid, container max-width 1000px at 1200px+, 80px vertical padding, fullscreen hero with overlay
visualStyle: Clean professional SaaS landing with blue accents and software mockup imagery

name: Fitness
title: Fitness - Responsive HTML Template
description: Fitness and gym single-page template with a fixed top navbar featuring logo and navigation links (Home, About, Trainers, Blog, Prices, Testimonials). Hero section has a fullscreen background image with large heading, subtitle, and LEARN MORE CTA button. Overview/About section with descriptive text and feature highlights. Trainers section displays 3 trainer cards in a 3-column grid, each with a photo, name, specialty, and social links. Newsletter subscription section with email input and parallax background. Blog section shows 3 blog post cards with images, dates, titles, excerpts, and Read More links. Pricing section features 3 pricing plan cards (Basic, Standard, Premium) with feature lists and CTA buttons. Testimonials section with an Owl Carousel of client quotes. Multi-page with blog-single.html detail page.

typography.style: Bold uppercase headings with wide letter-spacing, italic Lora for accents, strong fitness aesthetic

layoutDetails: Bootstrap 3 grid, container-based layout. Fixed top navbar. Fullscreen hero. Three-column grids for trainers, blog, and pricing. Parallax backgrounds on newsletter section. WOW.js scroll animations.
visualStyle: Dark, energetic fitness aesthetic with red accent color, bold uppercase typography, parallax backgrounds, card-based layouts, and dynamic scroll animations.

name: Metro Fit
title: Metro Fit HTML CSS template
description: Fitness and gym single-page template with bold blue (#0066CC) accent color. Top navbar with brand name. Hero section with large heading and subtitle. Content organized in alternating image-text blocks with fitness imagery. Gallery section with 14 images in grid layout using Magnific Popup lightbox. Multiple content sections. Clean layout with Open Sans typography at light weights. Responsive design with extensive breakpoint coverage from 425px to 1268px.

typography.style: Light-weight Open Sans with clean readability

layoutDetails: Bootstrap grid layout. Navbar with collapsible menu. Image-text alternating sections. Gallery grid with Magnific Popup lightbox. 12 responsive breakpoints.
visualStyle: Clean, energetic fitness aesthetic with strong blue accents. Image-heavy layout with lightbox gallery.

name: Training Studio
title: Training Studio - Free CSS Template
description: Fitness and gym single-page template with a dramatic video background hero section showing gym footage with an overlay, motivational heading, and a Become a Member CTA button. Features section displays 6 program items (Basic Fitness, Gym Training, Muscle Course, Yoga, Body Building) in two columns with icon images, titles, descriptions, and Discover More links. Call-to-action section with a motivational quote on a dark background. Classes section uses jQuery UI tabs with 4 training class options, each showing an image, title, description, and View Schedule button. Schedule section with a weekly timetable table. Contact form with Google Map. Preloader with animated dots.

typography.style: Bold Poppins headings with medium body weight, energetic feel

layoutDetails: Single-page with video background hero. Features in 2-column list layout. Classes use tabbed interface with image+text. Schedule uses HTML table. Contact with map embed.
visualStyle: Dark, energetic fitness aesthetic. Red-orange accent on dark backgrounds. Video hero with overlay. Bold typography. Schedule table with alternating row colors. Motivational and dynamic.

name: Gymfit
title: GymFit| Fitness template
description: Fitness and gym website with dark theme and orange accent. Hero slider with full-screen background images and overlay. Navigation with logo and multi-page links (Home, Pages, Services, Membership, Blog, Contact). Feature boxes below hero with icon and text. About section with split layout: image and text content. CTA section with background image and action button. Services section with icon cards in grid. Gallery section with image grid and lightbox. Testimonial section with carousel and dark background. Popular Courses section with course cards on gray background. Footer with logo, about text, quick links, and newsletter subscribe form.

typography.style: Bold condensed headings with clean body font, athletic/fitness feel

layoutDetails: Bootstrap container, full-screen hero slider, image gallery grid, course cards, responsive at 768px/480px/400px
visualStyle: Dark athletic fitness site with orange accents, hero slider, gallery grid, course cards, and bold typography

name: Gymso Fitness
title: Gymso Fitness HTML Template
description: Fitness and gym template built on Bootstrap 4 with a bold, energetic design. Features a full-screen hero section with a dark background image and large headline. A feature section highlights key gym benefits with icon cards. The about section includes gym description with an image and statistics. A classes section displays fitness class cards with images, schedules, and trainer info. A weekly schedule section presents a timetable grid showing class times across days. A contact section includes a form and gym location details. Uses AOS for entrance animations throughout. Custom Plain font with a vibrant red primary accent color against dark backgrounds.

typography.style: Custom Plain font throughout. Bold uppercase headings with normal body weight. Red accent on buttons and highlights.

layoutDetails: Full-screen hero with overlay. Icon-based feature cards row. Two-column about section with image. Multi-column class cards grid. Weekly schedule table. Contact form with info sidebar.
visualStyle: Bold dark fitness aesthetic. Vibrant red accent against near-black backgrounds. Image-heavy class showcases. AOS scroll animations for entrance effects.
